title: lotus minor
intro: Lotus minor, also known as the small-flowered lotus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. It is native to parts of Australia and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lotus minor include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various diseases such as diabetes and cancer. Lotus minor can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be obtained through commercial suppliers or grown and harvested in its natural habitat.
